domain: Afar Danakil salt caravan (Ethiopia/Eritrea/Djibouti Afar people; salt-mining + multi-day camel caravan from low-altitude Depression to highland markets; multi-trader assembly for mutual protection; established route waypoints)
specific_mechanism: Multi-segment LLM agent cascade with explicit FALLOFF-LOAD-REDISTRIBUTION: each agent A_i carries a fixed-size payload P_i (capacity K tokens). Hand-off compresses into P_{i+1} = compress(P_i ∪ updates_i, K). If segment A_i fails verification (output below quality threshold or violates format), its partial payload is REDISTRIBUTED across surviving agents (load-balanced top-up rather than re-emit). Each segment maintains a shared route-memory log for traceability.
llm_application: AFAR-CARAVAN-CASCADE: a multi-segment LLM agent cascade with falloff-redistribution + cross-segment redundancy. (1) Sequence of K agents A_1..A_K each with payload capacity B tokens; (2) hand-off P_{i+1} = compress(P_i ∪ A_i additions, B); (3) verification gate at segment-end checks output quality + format; (4) on failure of A_i, payload PARTIALLY REDISTRIBUTED across A_{i+1}..A_K via top-up rather than dropped — keeps caravan intact; (5) shared route-memory log shared across agents. Differs from TradingAgents 2412.20138 (role-pipeline analyst→trader→portfolio with no falloff-redistribution), CHAP (context-handoff between shift-agents, no redistribution), LangChain Handoffs (state passing without per-segment redundancy + redistribution), Swarm Routing 2026 (swarm coordination, not segment-cascade-with-falloff). Differs from R422 CHASQUI-RELAY (quipu summary memoryless), R429 PAJ-NTAUB-PANEL (bordered narrative panels), R413 SHERPA-RAPPEL (anchor verification).
novelty_claim: TradingAgents + CHAP + LangChain Handoffs + Swarm Routing cover multi-segment agent cascade space. AFAR-CARAVAN-CASCADE adds explicit FALLOFF-LOAD-REDISTRIBUTION + cross-segment redundancy + shared route-memory log. Recombination of cascade + load-balancing.
